The speech outlined US objectives and suggested alternative fuel sources.

title: Tiger Woods gets court approval to travel abroad for treatment after DUI
description: Tiger Woods has been granted permission by a Florida judge to travel outside the state and country as he seeks medical treatment following a DUI-related arrest. His legal team argued that specialized care and privacy concerns made overseas treatment necessary. While Woods faces ongoing charges, including refusal to submit to testing, the ruling allows him to prioritize recovery. The case continues, but the decision marks a significant step in balancing legal obligations with personal health needs.

It appeared to grieve, refusing to leave even as people gathered. The animal's unusual vigil continued until cremation preparations began. This heartwarming event was captured on video and shared widely.

Benioff criticized Microsoft's competitive tactics, questioning their AI spending's impact. This highlights growing concerns over Microsoft's influence in the AI sector.

Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
description: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi Mahomes’ emotional post
description: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Fact check: Did Druski and Erika Kirk respond to viral skit?
description: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.
